headline: Congress just gave DHS another $70 billion
summary: Congress approved $70 billion for the Department of Homeland Security. The funding supports President Trump's mass deportation agenda over three years. Both House and Senate votes were close and largely along party lines.

headline: The App Store is going to add subscription bundles soon
summary: Apple will introduce subscription bundles for iPhone apps later this year. Bundles will combine offers from various companies, not just Apple. This expands on existing streaming video bundles like Apple TV and Peacock.

headline: GM thinks EVs can help offset AI’s energy suck with vehicle-to-grid tech
summary: GM announced new initiatives for EV batteries and energy storage. They plan to activate vehicle-to-grid (V2G) capabilities for EV owners. V2G tech aims to offset energy demand from AI data centers.

headline: Microsoft AI head calls out Anthropic for acting like Claude is conscious
summary: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman criticized Anthropic. Suleyman warned against speculating about Claude AI's consciousness. He believes such claims are "dangerous" and could influence the AI's behavior.

headline: Treat Dad to a Brand New Pair of Apple AirPods Pro 3 Earbuds for Father's Day, Now 20% Off at Amazon
summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 earbuds are currently 20% off at Amazon. This deal is promoted as a Father's Day gift idea. The AirPods Pro 3 are highlighted as top noise-canceling earbuds for iPhone users.

headline: Save 20% Off Refurbished VITURE XR Glasses on eBay Ahead of Father's Day
summary: Refurbished VITURE XR Glasses are 20% off on eBay. The offer is available ahead of Father's Day. These glasses provide a portable, 175-inch simulated display for devices like the Steam Deck.

headline: The LEGO Sagrada Família Set Should Have Followed the Hogwarts Castle Release Strategy
summary: The LEGO Sagrada Família set is discussed in relation to its release strategy. The article suggests it should have been released as multiple sets over time. This strategy is compared to the successful Hogwarts Castle series.

headline: Save 20% Off the Possibly Soon-to-be-Retired LEGO Super Mario World: Mario & Yoshi Building Set
summary: The LEGO Super Mario World: Mario & Yoshi building set is 20% off. The set is rumored to be retired soon, potentially by July 31. This offers a last chance to purchase the popular Mario & Yoshi set.

headline: David Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
summary: David Sullivan was banned from contact with West Ham's women's and youth teams. The ban has been in place since 2023. This decision followed a safeguarding investigation by the Football Association.

headline: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
summary: Rebel forces in Myanmar are reportedly losing ground. The military is forcibly conscripting men into the army. A BBC team documented the unfolding war from frontline rebel positions.

headline: The rebels at the front line of Myanmar's civil war
summary: BBC's Quentin Sommerville traveled to Myanmar without official permission. He met with rebel fighters on the front lines of the civil war. The report provides an inside look at the conflict.

headline: Bowen: Trump and Netanyahu wanted to reshape the Middle East - now they risk a permacrisis
summary: Trump and Netanyahu aimed to reshape the Middle East. Their actions, particularly regarding Iran, have created a risk of "permacrisis." The leaders are described as having lost control of the consequences of their policies.
